name: Artificer
description: Artificer is a Maroon coloured slug cat from rain world. She has a scar over their right eye, which she lost to an explosive scavenger spear. She used to be a mother, before one day, due to one of her children's mistakes, both of her children were lost to the scavengers. Since then, she has done nothing but been brutally violent against scavengers. She is capable of doing small explosions to propel herself through the air, and she is capable of applying volatile liquid to spears and rocks.
creator: jakami
